posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now integrate Google Sheets with monday using the Data Importer monday app for free.

A few things you can do with Google Sheets using Data mporter

  • Update existing items in your monday board from rows in your Google Sheet.
  • Map to columns in your existing board and import directly into an existing groups.
  • Import large sheets (over 10,000 rows) into monday.
  • Schedule imports so that your monday board syncs automatically with your sheet.
  • Import from several other sources within one app (e.g. Facebook Ads, Instagram, Excel and more).

I’ve also created a step-by-step tutorial for more details on how to import Google Sheet rows into monday.

googlesheet-existing1176×748 41.8 KB

posts.author: LeanneM (Leanne McConnachie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is this an import or an integration?
The integration that I would like to see would be input into a column in Monday it updates a google sheet and also input into a Google sheet updates the column on Monday.

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml: @LeanneM This is only for importing from Google Sheets into monday. I believe there are other apps/tools that let you do a 2 way sync.

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LeanneM

We have a developed resynced.io that does exactly that. Here’s the app: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000688/resyncedio

Here’s a detailed step-by-step guide: resynced.io - How to synchronize monday.com board and Google Sheets spreadsheet

I’m happy to guide you through the setup process if you want. Feel free to reach out anytime.
